descriptionTemplate:
{Dimension Shuttle}: After playing the first Command Card each turn, move a Temporary Base Copy of it to {Ultra Space}. This cannot trigger during {Ultra Round}.
{Ultra Round}: Upon entering an {Ultra Round}, place all cards in {Ultra Space} into hand instead of drawing. DMG, Shield, HP Recovery, Keyflare, Aliemus, {STR} changes, {Poison}, {Counter}, and {Bleed} caused during {Ultra Round} -25%.
{Annihilation}: Once per turn, remove the leftmost card in {Ultra Space} and gain 1 "Insight".
{Ultra Mastery}: For each 1 point of Realm Mastery, there is a [StateArg1]% probability at turn start to gain 1 "Insight". If the probability exceeds 100%, multiple copies can be obtained.
{Pure Ultra}: If the team consists only of {Ultra} Awakeners, the {Ultra Mastery} effect is doubled, and the team is no longer affected by the stat reduction during {Ultra Round}.
